json_data.title: Searching Algorithms
json_data.reason: This topic naturally complements sorting by exploring how to efficiently find data once it has been organized, building on the concept of optimized searching.

json_data.title: Amortized Analysis of Algorithms
json_data.reason: This advanced analysis technique provides a deeper understanding of the average performance of operations over a sequence, crucial for evaluating complex data structures and dynamic algorithms beyond worst-case scenarios.

json_data.title: Computational Complexity Theory
json_data.reason: This field investigates the fundamental limits of what problems can be solved efficiently by algorithms, providing a theoretical framework for understanding the inherent difficulty of problems like sorting and beyond.
